name: Mosaic Chronicles
short_description: Unravel enchanting stories of love and courage through captivating stained-glass puzzles.
detailed_description:
Gather 'round, weary traveler, and let the magic of Mosaic Chronicles whisk you away!

In this captivating puzzle game, inspired by the whimsical tales of Olga Gromyko, you'll assemble breathtaking stained-glass mosaics to unveil stories of bravery, love, and a dash of good fortune.

Features:

  • Two Complete Stories: Embark on two enchanting adventures, "A Bit of Horoscoping" and "The Lucky Knot," each filled with vibrant characters and unexpected twists.
  • 50 Unique Puzzles: Piece together over 50 intricately designed stained-glass mosaics, each revealing a new chapter in the story.
  • Customizable Difficulty: Choose from four difficulty levels to find the perfect challenge for your puzzle-solving skills.
  • Beautiful Art & Storytelling: Immerse yourself in a world of vibrant colors and captivating narratives.
  • Gallery & Progress Tracking: Admire your completed mosaics and track your progress as you journey through the stories.

Can you weave the threads of fate and guide our heroes to their happily ever afters?

supported_languages:
English*, Polish*, Russian*, Japanese*, Simplified Chinese*, Traditional Chinese*, Korean*
*languages with full audio support
